_meta.purpose: Per-module task decomposition for the autonomous harness. CRUD is NOT enough: each module is classified by archetype, and its task list adds data-sourcing and/or cross-module business-flow tasks beyond persistence. progress.mjs reads this to generate the queue. Grounded in docs/CreatorOS-storage-and-business-logic.md + data-model.md + 七步整合设计.md + module plans (2026-06-22 research).

task_types.repo: backend: Drizzle repository + pglite test, CRUD + invariants/FSM transitions/idempotency. [no deps]
task_types.data-source: how REAL data enters: ingest adapter (scrape/API) / AI-worker generation / object-storage upload+metadata / derived-compute / seed. [needs repo]
task_types.flow: cross-module business wiring: UoW fan-out, post-commit emit (search/notif), state-machine edges, feedback loops. [needs repo]
task_types.frontend: wire the UI to the persisted+sourced ops via transport + PERSISTED_OPS + round-trip test. [needs repo/data-source/flow as applicable]
task_types.e2e: end-to-end create->persist(SQL)->render + visual; evaluator/human sets e2e_verified. [last]

projects.data_source: create form mints Project + seeds 6 ProjectStages + 4 OutputStages (atomic UoW); progress/current_stage are recomputed caches
projects.flows: HEAD of pipeline; receives setPrimaryOutputAsset/markOutputPublished callbacks from Production/Publishing; emits activity -> search+notifications
oss: twentyhq/twenty — stage-on-entity drives both table & kanban

knowledge.data_source: UI-authored OR AI-distilled OR ingested-as-candidate; append-only KnowledgeRevision (never UPDATE old)
knowledge.flows: evidence links to artifacts; feeds search index + AI context-tools; survives project archive

assets.data_source: two-phase upload (presign -> S3 -> complete) with metadata harvested via headObject; also minted by Production export + Ingestion
assets.flows: export -> registerGeneratedAsset -> ContentOutput.primary_asset_id; cover validated by Publishing

artifacts.data_source: user saves + AI candidates (createdByType:ai) ONLY via AiService.confirmResult->createVersion; immutable ArtifactVersion; structured children replaced per version
artifacts.flows: master_script -> output_script (derived_from); EvidenceLink to knowledge/assets; review report is an Artifact
oss: TypeCellOS/BlockNote — jsonb block document model (AI-rewritable per block)

production.data_source: production settings + timeline segments; exports.complete (mock render in dev) registers result Asset
production.flows: FLOW-export UoW: exports.complete -> registerGeneratedAsset -> setPrimaryOutputAsset -> markOutputPublished -> post-commit search+activity+notif

publishing.data_source: publisher.publish returns external_id/url recorded as fact-of-record; status follows external truth
publishing.flows: publish -> markOutputPublished; anchor for all metrics; content-calendar reconciles against it; (platform,external_id) UNIQUE idempotency
oss: gitroomhq/postiz-app — per-platform adapter + scheduled-post queue (CLOSEST stack match)

analytics.data_source: appendSnapshot called BY Ingestion (FLOW-019): raw_metrics -> normalized MetricValue -> retention/audience curves; idempotent (publication,source,captured_at) UNIQUE
analytics.flows: feeds Review evidence, Dashboard 数据概览, Publishing Center, Calibration actuals; 七步 adds conversion/revenue metric keys

reviews.data_source: form; period derived from Publishing min/max published_at; ReviewInsight.evidence derived from Analytics snapshots
reviews.flows: Analytics -> Review -> confirmed insights promoteReviewInsight -> Learning; can trigger positioning revision; feeds Calibration
oss: ParabolInc/parabol — retro -> action-items(owner,due) linking to next project

learnings.data_source: quick-record OR promoted from ReviewInsight (review_id backref); confidenceScore = min(100, appCount*20 + (validated?40:0))
learnings.flows: LearningApplication = 二次验证 in new projects; Calibration adjusts confidence; Dashboard suggestions read top validated

notifications.data_source: NOT self-authored: owning modules call insert() post-commit (task/publish/import/system/ai + cadence_gap); event-emitted ledger
notifications.flows: shell bell countUnread (Dashboard query service); mark-read idempotent; cadence_gap fired once-on-edge by content-calendar
oss: novuhq/novu — workflow + subscriber + in-app feed schema

search.data_source: SearchDocument is a DERIVED, rebuildable index (not truth): owning modules upsertDocument post-commit; FTS + (deferred) pgvector
search.flows: shell search -> pages.search.get composes results; index failure non-throwing (never rolls back business truth); rebuildUserIndex

settings.data_source: UserPreference/ModelConfiguration/AgentConfiguration upsert; seeded canonical model configs; secret_reference indirection (never raw key)
settings.flows: AI worker consumes resolveModelForCapability with fallback chain (capability -> default -> claude-opus-4-8)
oss: BerriAI/litellm — per-tenant model-config + virtual-key + spend ledger

taxonomy.data_source: Tag CRUD + EntityTag polymorphic join (entity_type/entity_id soft refs); seeded from fixtures
taxonomy.flows: Research/Knowledge read tags via listForEntity/listEntitiesForTag -> /search?tag=; the one retained polymorphic association

ingestion.data_source: THE single external write path: ExternalSource adapters (douyin scrape, Feishu survey) -> IngestionRun -> per-record; raw payload kept verbatim; double idempotency (source,idempotency_key)+(run,record_key)
ingestion.flows: FLOW-019 ingest metrics->Analytics.appendSnapshot; FLOW-020 ingest knowledge/assets as candidates (never overwrite current); feeds AudienceSignal/Lead/Calibration actuals
oss: miniflux/v2 — idempotent ingest: entry-hash dedup + conditional GET + per-source scheduling

ai.data_source: @creatoros/ai-worker subprocess: ai.tasks.create -> claim(queued->running) -> ClaudeAgentRunner (or FakeAgentRunner w/o key) -> submit_candidate once -> AITaskResult
ai.flows: SOLE AI write seam: confirmResult (AI-free) -> ArtifactsService.createVersion / Candidate / Knowledge / ReviewInsight; task FSM queued->running->awaiting_confirmation->succeeded|failed|cancelled

candidate.data_source: manual(source:idea) + AI(trend/benchmark/demand) via createFromAIResult on confirm + AudienceSignal ingested (douyin comments/DM); demand_count derived from signals
candidate.flows: ranked by predictedScore(Calibration)/positioningFit(Positioning gate)/demandCount; candidates.promote -> createProject (atomic, writes TopicPromotion)

calibration.data_source: Rubric/RubricVersion (immutable, 变现加权 dims not play-count) + blind Prediction lock + CalibrationResult.actualMetrics recycled from verified IngestionRun->Analytics
calibration.flows: FLOW-校准闭环: Score->Blind-Predict(lock)->Publish->Retro(T+N ingest)->Result->RubricVersion bump + Learning.confidence adjust->re-rank Candidates; data-refresh TodoCard auto N days post-publish

monetization.data_source: 柔性 Product + append-only Offer price snapshot + Lead (manual OR Feishu survey via Ingestion) + ConversionEvent; funnel + unattributed bucket computed at read
monetization.flows: FLOW-变现归因: intent(content_role + ContentOutputProduct) vs actual(Lead.attributed_content_id, lossy); conversion.purchase -> Analytics conversion/revenue -> Dashboard first-class columns; NEVER force-100%-allocate (honest unattributed)

positioning.data_source: CreatorProfile upsert + PositioningStatement immutable version chain + AI-revise via confirm seam
positioning.flows: PositioningGate (deterministic service, NO table/NO AI) scores candidate/project positioning_fit 0-100, advisory/non-blocking; ReviewInsight -> positioning revision (loop)

platform-account.data_source: accounts.create(platform,handle,secretReference?,followerBaseline?); UNIQUE(user,platform,handle); secret_reference is a pointer never raw token
platform-account.flows: Publication.account_id/ProjectTargetPlatform.account_id validated via assertOwnedAccount; per-account metrics are READ-TIME rollup (no new ingest path)
oss: gitroomhq/postiz-app — OAuth account model + per-platform constraints

content-calendar.data_source: ContentCalendarEntry(planned_at, output|candidate) + PublishingCadence per account; status reconciled by READING published reality (no new write path)
content-calendar.flows: FLOW-发布节奏达成: cadence -> planned slots -> publish -> reconcile(planned->published | past-grace->missed 断更) -> cadence_gap notification once; attainment -> Dashboard lagging accounts
